flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Midwest Technical Institute-Illinois fell 13% between 2006 and 2009 (73.7% → 64.1%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Midwest Technical Institute-Illinois rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (70.5% → 78.0%).
